interactive-vr/Cozy Experience.title: Cozy Zen (Game)
interactive-vr/Cozy Experience.description: Cozy Experience is my thesis project that explores cozy game experiences through the concept of a Zen garden. The goal was to create a calming yet engaging interactive environment that offers players a sense of relaxation and presence. Within a very limited timeframe, I independently developed both the theoretical thesis and a fully playable prototype. I was responsible for the entire production process, including animation, visual design, and game development, bringing the concept to life using Unity and Blender. I also utilized Codex to support the coding process and gameplay implementation. Despite the tight schedule, this project became a highly rewarding and educational journey — from learning programming fundamentals to experimenting with mechanics and refining every detail from concept to playable prototype.

interactive-vr/VR Experience.title: VR Experience
interactive-vr/VR Experience.description: Immersive VR work combining spatial layout, real-time media, and guided focus across a sequence of scenes.

motion/Jazz Fest Commercial.title: Jazz Fest Commercial
motion/Jazz Fest Commercial.description: Commercial motion piece for a jazz festival—rhythm, typography, and picture cut to music and brand tone.

motion/Spotify Canvas Design.title: Spotify Canvas Design
motion/Spotify Canvas Design.description: Data as choreography and brand-forward motion—a hero piece for launch and festival screens.

campaigns/JusteDebout.title: Juste Debout
campaigns/JusteDebout.description: Campaign and motion work for Juste Debout—rhythm, framing, and social-ready visuals built for the stage.

campaigns/Western Union.title: Western Union
campaigns/Western Union.description: I worked on commercial projects for Western Union, producing animated promotional materials using Adobe After Effects. The content was developed in multiple languages including Greek, Georgian, Russian, and English, to effectively reach and engage diverse international audiences.

3d-archive/Emberfall-Environment.title: Realistic Short Film
3d-archive/Emberfall-Environment.description: End-to-end development of a large-scale, fantasy-inspired library environment for a realistic short film—at the intersection of design, storytelling, and real-time production. Set in the Emberfall Kingdom; the work covered environment assets, layout, optimized UV workflows, and the final trailer including video editing and sound design. Texturing, PBR materials, and the princess character were created by other artists.

3d-archive/FB.title: Fashion Battle
3d-archive/FB.description: 3D fashion visuals—environment, lighting, and cinematic presentation for a competitive fashion context.

2d-archive/Illustrations.title: Illustrations
2d-archive/Illustrations.description: Selected illustration work—series, composition, color, and narrative tone across print and digital.

2d-archive/Psychodelic Magazine.title: Psychedelic Magazine
2d-archive/Psychodelic Magazine.description: Editorial and magazine spreads—layout, typography, and image treatment for a bold print identity.
